03-task-special-enemies.summary: "Define 6 special enemies (Iron Kick, Static Choir, Backstage Blur — elite; Redline Headliner, Blue Noise Monarch, Verdant Encore — boss). Extended CombatEnemyDefinition with optional displayName/silhouetteMotif/isSpecial fields. Added createSpecialEnemy() factory. Integrated into ENEMY_DEFINITIONS alongside 12 existing ordinary enemies (18 total). 13 durable tests verify invariants: correct IDs, archetypes, positive stats, non-empty display names/motifs, and backward compat for ordinary enemies. tsc --noEmit and all tests pass."

04-task-pawn-rebalance.summary: "Updated all 12 pawn baseDamage values per design spec, changed PAWN_TIER_DAMAGE_MULTIPLIER from [1,3,8] to [1,2.5,6], updated projectileCount/volleyShotCount for thorn-fan (5→14), lifebloom-scatter (3→14), prism-volley (3→14), arc-bounce (added projectileCount:5), updated meteor-drop burn damagePerTick (18→4), and refreshed tooltip strings with new damage numbers. tsc --noEmit passes, all 238 tests pass, no tests hardcode config values — all use invariant-based assertions."

05-task-economy-and-modifier-staging.summary: "Rebalanced economy (INITIAL_COINS 50→25, MERGE_REWARD_COINS 4→3), added SHOP_REROLL_INCREMENT:1 to StageFlowConfig, fixed getStageRerollCost to use config increment instead of hardcoded +1, added formula contract test. SlotModifierAssignment weight overrides mechanism was already correctly implemented and tested (8 tests cover count weights, premium cap, zero-weight exclusion, overrides). All 239 tests pass, tsc --noEmit clean."

06-task-session-progress-and-stars.summary: "SessionProgressStore singleton with Map-based in-memory storage, isBetter comparison (higher stars wins, same stars + higher HP wins, defeat never overwrites success), calculateStageStars with configurable thresholds (0/1/2/3 stars based on HP ratio), edge cases handled (HP ≤ 0, maxBaseHp ≤ 0, HP > max cap at 1.0). 22 tests pass — all behavioral/invariant-based (boundary behavior, isBetter comparisons, defeat persistence, null HP handling, singleton guarantee), zero config-value snapshots. tsc --noEmit clean."

07-task-stage-runtime-plumbing.summary: "StageRuntime now stores stageConfig, buildStageWaveEnemyPayload scales HP by stage multipliers with dedup and error handling, StageWavePreview returns StageWavePreviewModel with special enemy name resolution, EventBus snapshot carries wavePreview. 14/14 tests pass, tsc clean, no config-value snapshot violations in task changes."

08-task-flow-coordinator-plumbing.summary: "StageFlowCoordinator now reads waves from runtime.stageConfig via buildStageWaveEnemyPayload (not global config); createLaunchCombatCommand includes subWaves + enemyStatOverrides; combat:ended event carries remainingBaseHp, piped through StageFlowIntent → resolveCombatReturn; terminal phases (stage_complete/stage_failed) emit stage:return-to-lobby with stageId, calculated stars, and remainingBaseHp; StageScene handler has placeholder case; npx tsc --noEmit clean; 7/7 flow coordinator tests pass, all follow behavioral/invariant/contract testing rules with expect.any(Number) and toBeGreaterThan comparisons — zero config-value snapshot violations."

09-task-combat-integration.summary: "CombatRuntime/Factory/WaveRuntime now accept stage-scoped subWaves + enemyStatOverrides from payload, CombatScene forwards fields from init data, backward-compat fallback to CombatWaveConfig when options.subWaves is absent. 274/274 tests pass, tsc --noEmit clean. Tests follow behavioral/invariant rules — no config-value snapshots."
